analysisResult.goal: Help users achieve deep focus by linking a Pomodoro-style timer to specific tasks, tracking focus time per task, and minimizing distractions.

features.name: Load Today's Tasks
features.description: Fetch and display all tasks due today sorted by priority.

features.name: Toggle Task Complete
features.description: Users mark tasks as completed or revert completion with a single tap.

features.name: Search Tasks
features.description: Real-time search filters tasks by title or tag keywords.

features.name: Daily Stats Summary
features.description: Dashboard shows tasks completed, total focus time, and current streak.

features.name: Start Focus Session
features.description: Begin a 25-minute Pomodoro session linked to a selected task.

features.name: Pause / Resume Timer
features.description: Users can pause and resume the active focus session at any time.

features.name: Complete Session
features.description: Finalize a session and automatically log focus time to the linked task.

features.name: Distraction Tracking
features.description: System detects when users leave the app and shows a refocus prompt.

data.title: Start
data.description: Workflow entry point

prdReference.rationale: Entry point

data.title: Initialize Home Dashboard
data.description: Load all tasks and today's date for the home screen

config.functionCode: return { tasks: [{"id": "task-001", "title": "Review quarterly report", "priority": "high", "dueDate": "2026-03-25", "completed": false, "focusTime": 0, "tags": ["work"]}, {"id": "task-002", "title": "Prepare presentation slides", "priority": "high", "dueDate": "2026-03-26", "completed": false, "focusTime": 1800, "tags": ["work"]}, {"id": "task-003", "title": "Read design patterns book", "priority": "medium", "dueDate": "2026-03-28", "completed": true, "focusTime": 3600, "tags": ["learning"]}, {"id": "task-004", "title": "Write unit tests", "priority": "low", "dueDate": "2026-03-30", "completed": false, "focusTime": 900, "tags": ["work", "coding"]}], todayDate: '2026-03-24' };

prdReference.rationale: Provides initial task data and date context for the dashboard

data.description: Fetch, sort, and display all tasks due today

data.description: GET /tasks?date=today returns tasks due today

data.title: Sort by Priority
data.description: Order tasks by priority (high → medium → low)

config.functionCode: const order = {high:0,medium:1,low:2}; return { tasks: [...inputData.tasks].sort((a,b) => order[a.priority]-order[b.priority]), pendingCount: inputData.tasks.filter(t => !t.completed).length };

prdReference.rationale: Sorts task list so high-priority items appear first

testCases.description: Valid execution of Sort by Priority

testCases.name: Failure case
testCases.description: Error handling in Sort by Priority

testCases.name: Edge case
testCases.description: Boundary conditions in Sort by Priority

data.title: Build Task Cards
data.description: Transform task data into renderable card format

config.functionCode: return { taskCards: inputData.tasks.map(t => ({ id: t.id, title: t.title, priority: t.priority, completed: t.completed, dueDate: t.dueDate })) };

prdReference.rationale: Converts sorted task data into display-ready card objects

data.title: Search Tasks
data.description: Let users quickly find tasks by title or tag keywords

data.title: Parse Search Query
data.description: Extract and sanitize the search string from user input

config.functionCode: return { query: 'report', tasks: inputData.tasks };

prdReference.rationale: Normalizes the search query string before filtering

data.title: Filter Matching Tasks
data.description: Return tasks whose title or tags match the query

config.functionCode: const q = inputData.query.toLowerCase(); return { tasks: inputData.tasks.filter(t => t.title.toLowerCase().includes(q) || t.tags.some(tag => tag.includes(q))), query: inputData.query, resultCount: inputData.tasks.filter(t => t.title.toLowerCase().includes(q)).length };

prdReference.rationale: Applies case-insensitive search across task titles and tags

testCases.description: Valid execution of Filter Matching Tasks

testCases.name: Failure case
testCases.description: Error handling in Filter Matching Tasks

testCases.name: Edge case
testCases.description: Boundary conditions in Filter Matching Tasks

data.title: Show Search Results
data.description: Render filtered task cards with result count

config.functionCode: return { taskCards: inputData.tasks.map(t => ({ id: t.id, title: t.title, priority: t.priority, completed: t.completed, dueDate: t.dueDate })), message: `${inputData.resultCount} task found for '${inputData.query}'` };

prdReference.rationale: Renders filtered results with a count message

data.title: Daily Stats Summary
data.description: Show productivity metrics: tasks completed, focus time, streak

data.title: Calculate Daily Stats
data.description: Aggregate task counts and total focus time

config.functionCode: const total = inputData.tasks.length; const done = inputData.tasks.filter(t=>t.completed).length; const focus = inputData.tasks.reduce((s,t)=>s+t.focusTime,0); return { totalTasks: total, completedToday: done, pendingTasks: total-done, totalFocusTime: focus };

prdReference.rationale: Computes today's productivity metrics from task data

testCases.name: Success case
testCases.description: Valid execution of Calculate Daily Stats

testCases.name: Failure case
testCases.description: Error handling in Calculate Daily Stats

testCases.name: Edge case
testCases.description: Boundary conditions in Calculate Daily Stats

data.description: POST /stats/sync saves daily stats for streak tracking

data.description: Build the daily summary card for the dashboard

prdReference.rationale: Builds the stats card UI component from computed metrics

data.title: Start Focus Session
data.description: Begin a timed focus session linked to a specific task

data.title: Select Task & Configure
data.description: User selects task and sets focus duration (default 25 min)

config.functionCode: const task = inputData.tasks.find(t => !t.completed) || inputData.tasks[0]; return { selectedTask: task, sessionConfig: { duration: 1500, breakDuration: 300 } };

prdReference.rationale: Selects the highest-priority pending task and configures the Pomodoro timer

data.title: Show Refocus Prompt
data.description: Display encouraging message to guide user back to focus

config.functionCode: const count = inputData.totalDistractions; return { message: `You've been distracted ${count} times. Stay focused!`, tasks: [{id:'task-001',title:'Review quarterly report',priority:'high',dueDate:'2026-03-25',completed:false,focusTime:0,tags:['work']},{id:'task-002',title:'Prepare presentation slides',priority:'high',dueDate:'2026-03-26',completed:false,focusTime:1800,tags:['work']},{id:'task-003',title:'Read design patterns book',priority:'medium',dueDate:'2026-03-28',completed:true,focusTime:3600,tags:['learning']},{id:'task-004',title:'Write unit tests',priority:'low',dueDate:'2026-03-30',completed:false,focusTime:900,tags:['work','coding']}], suggestion: 'Try closing other apps to minimize interruptions.' };

outputData.message: You've been distracted 2 times. Stay focused!
outputData.suggestion: Try closing other apps to minimize interruptions.

prdReference.rationale: Generates a motivational prompt to encourage the user to refocus
